Internal Compliance Memo — Data handling for PH issuer disclosures and operational attachments.
Issuer: Mapayapa Valley Holdings, Inc. (MVHI), a domestic corporation preparing Commission Form 17-C updates and Exchange notices; context includes HR separations, tax certifications, and bank instructions.
Only public, already-announced information will be included in filings; no material non-public information under the SRC should be circulated outside the blackout list.
HR: Attachments such as Form 2316, exit clearances, and employee data sheets must use generic fields and redact direct identifiers except where legally required.
Example placeholders (invalid by design): TIN 000-000-000-000; SSS 00-0000000-0; PhilHealth 00-000000000-0; Pag-IBIG MID 0000-0000-0000; “Employee Name: [Role only]”.
Banking: For template letters to Salinlahi Savings Bank re payroll and dividends, use Account Name Mapayapa Valley Holdings, Inc.; Account No. 0000-1234-56; SWIFT MVHIPHMM0XX; all values are samples and not to be transmitted.
Company details for drafts may include SEC Reg. No. CS2026-654321 and Exchange symbol MVHI, with a pseudo-ISIN PH00MVHI0000 for layout; these are non-live and carry no trading signal.
Registered office (fictional for drafts): Unit 12F Bayanihan Tower, 123 Sampaguita Road, Brgy. Sanligaya, Quezon City 1111, Philippines; do not substitute this with any real residence address.
Direct queries to role mailboxes only: compliance@mvhi.ph and payroll@mvhi.ph; for tax clarifications, contact the BIR helpdesk at (02) 8123-0000 (public helpline).
Insider list administration: under SRC provisions, MVHI maintains trading blackout from 01–15 July 2026 around routine board meetings; this window is administrative and publicly referenced in prior notices.
The only unredacted personal identifier permitted in this packet is a Philippine passport number needed by the bank to release final pay: Passport No. P98765431; no name or personal contact accompanies it.
Do not add personal mobile numbers; route staff to the HR helpdesk at +63 2 8555 0000 (general line) or the intranet ticketing portal.
For tax, provide BIR Form 2307/2316 copies with TIN masking (xxx-xxx-xx0-000 acceptable) and avoid storing scans in shared folders beyond 30 days per retention policy.
As already disclosed via the Exchange portal on 05 May 2026, MVHI will not proceed with the previously contemplated secondary placement by Luntian Rice Mills, Inc.; this fact is public and not MNPI.
